info.title: Product Catalog API
info.description: REST API for the WFD Product Catalog & Review Platform

post.summary: Login and receive a Sanctum token

get.summary: Get a single category by slug

get.description: Unauthenticated requests only return published products. Authenticated requests return all.

post.summary: Submit a review for a product
post.description: Public endpoint. Rate-limited to 5 requests per minute. Review is pending approval after submission.

message.example: Review submitted successfully. It will appear after approval.
